briefs.title: Active ETF Models
briefs.summary: Objective-based ETF-model offering positioned for advisors who want tax-aware implementation, transparency, and relatively low-cost active ETF building blocks.
key_points: Combines the tax advantages of the ETF vehicle with tax-aware investing.
Emphasizes transparency through daily holdings disclosure.
Positions success through an objective-based lens rather than excess return alone.
Can be paired with practice-management and portfolio-analysis conversations instead of pure product pitching.
talk_tracks: Use when the advisor needs a cleaner implementation format, not just another fund idea.
Tie the conversation to scalability, documentation, taxable implementation, advisor differentiation or client communication.
Lead with fit for the advisor's business problem before discussing product mechanics.
risk_notes: Avoid overstating history or promising outcomes.
Keep compliance and suitability language in mind for fiduciary-oriented advisors.
Use cases should be grounded in actual households, client objectives and account types.
